Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Anna Dubrovsky, Esq. of the Dubrovsky Law Group Inc., 415.746.1477, appearing for the Plaintiff Anna Mims;
Atty. Christopher B. Whitman, Esq. of the Office of the City Attorney, 415.554.4240, appearing for the Defendant.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court offers to defer it's ruling pending a settlement evaluation. Ms. Dobrovsky declines the Court's offer noting that prior to any settlement conference the Court's ruling on the Motion for Summary Judgment would be important.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
